chapter_title.en: Supporting the weak and the low-spirited on the battlefield of Siffin

text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) قاله لاصحابه في ساعة الحرب بصفين

en.sayed-ali-raza: Amīr al-mu’minīn’s address to his followers on the battlefield of Ṣiffīn About supporting the weak and the low-spirited during the fighting
